business.name: Panadería La Reina Imperial
business.tagline: Conchas warm from the oven, every day.

payments.notes: Client-owned Stripe Payment Links ONLY (https://buy.stripe.com/...). Card data flows to Stripe, never to this site or the agency. Empty tokens are stripped in client builds and forced to '#' in demo builds. See docs/STRIPE_SETUP.md.

meta.notes: Variation B (modern panadería-café). All branding (colors, fonts) lives in assets/css/custom.css as CSS custom properties. Demo only — concept preview, not affiliated with the business.
